comment: OSINT 3h sweep (04:15 UTC 2026-07-16, lookback from ~01:00 UTC). Radar channels monitored: radarrussiia, exilenova_plus. Findings: radarrussiia — faint BPLA fixations (Tambov, Bryansk, Kaluga, Saratov regions, Moscow area), no specific fuel infrastructure targets confirmed; exilenova_plus — Engels airfield strike (military, out of scope); WebSearch verified Syzran NPZ attack occurred 2026-07-12 (already in archive). No new confirmed/reported strikes on fuel infrastructure (NPZ/neft bases/terminals/energy) detected in lookback window. Archive baseline from 2026-07-15 night unchanged.
